creator: kiwi@oav.net
text:
Uppon start of netatalk3 a sig11 is issued :
Jan 28 23:00:01 filer netatalk[1128]: Restarting 'afpd' (restarts: 437)
Jan 28 23:00:02 filer kernel: pid 90855 (afpd), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
Jan 28 23:00:02 filer netatalk[1128]: Restarting 'afpd' (restarts: 438)
Jan 28 23:00:02 filer kernel: pid 91109 (afpd), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
(...)

Here is gdb of /aftpd.core

This error on this platform is reproductible what ever you use the pkg for FreeBSD 9.2 AMD64 or
 compiled ports. 

I have tryed all options on the ports except MDNS responder (I use avahi).

NOTE: I don't use TimeMachine on this host.

How-To-Repeat: 
pkg install netatalk3
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/netatalk start.
